FameThrower
Universe

She doesn't throw flames.
She throws FAME.

Original anime characters · World of Elysara · New episodes every Tue & Thu

📸 Follow on Instagram

Origin Story

Born in the Ember Districts of Elysara

"Dual-element children are born once per century. The moment she waved that wand, everyone who saw it felt suddenly, inexplicably… famous."

In the world of Elysara, Fame is a literal magical force. Those who can harness it become FameCasters. The most powerful FameCaster who ever lived started with nothing — born in the poorest district of the realm, finding a wand nobody dropped, on an ordinary grey day that changed everything.

The Fame Squad

Meet the Characters

FameThrower
🔥 Fire + Fame

Ignia Solara. Born in the Ember Districts. Found the wand nobody dropped. When she throws fame, people remember who they truly are. She doesn't just have hard days — she uses them to help others through theirs.

⭐ Legendary FameCaster
AquaStrike
💧 Water + Lightning

He didn't follow FameThrower. He found her. Cool, precise — already going viral before anyone knew his name. Lightning inside water. He showed FameThrower how to go still. How to listen. How to let the current carry her.

⚡ Goes Viral
The Chibi King
👑 Crown + Courage

He was broken. Now he's dangerous. Not dangerous like a threat — dangerous like someone who finally knows their worth. Fame amplifies the truth of who you already are. And when you stand in that truth, the people around you feel permission to stand in theirs.

🔥 Restored & Rising
⚡
VoltCaster
⚡ Lightning + Sound

A gift so loud it scares even them. When VoltCaster finally learns to control the sound, everyone stops and listens.

🌟 Coming Soon
🌿
TerraBoom
🌿 Earth + Explosion

Appeared quietly, without drama. Somehow that was the most dramatic thing of all. TerraBoom builds legacy — one unshakeable foundation at a time.

🌟 Coming Soon
🖤
VoidWhisper
🖤 Shadow + Stars

Nobody remembers her arriving. That's exactly how she wanted it. VoidWhisper creates obsession from the shadows — quietly, powerfully, inevitably.

🌟 Mystery Drop

The World of Elysara

Read the Lore

Chapter One

The Girl from the Ember Districts

In the world of Elysara, Fame is not a feeling. It is a force — a tangible, cosmic energy that flows through the realm like electricity through wire. Ignia Solara was born invisible. Born in the Ember Districts — the poorest corner of a world already divided sharply between the famous and the forgotten.

Chapter Two

The Wand That Changed Everything

She was seven years old when she picked up a wand from grey cobblestones. No one had dropped it for her. But the moment her fingers closed around it, purple stars erupted — and every person in the street felt, for one impossible moment, like the most famous person in the world.

Chapter Three

The Fame Squad Assembles

She did not build her team. Her team found her. AquaStrike arrived first. The Chibi King found his crown after losing it in the rubble of everything they said he wasn't. And the others are coming. Fame doesn't stay with one person. It spreads. It always has.

Follow the Fame

Get Famous With Us

New episodes drop every Tuesday and Thursday. Follow along as the Fame Squad grows and Elysara expands.
